---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What's missing or hard today, and who it affects.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it affects accuracy or autonomy, note how it would be
*measured* (this project reports real, reproducible numbers).

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why this one.
